notes: Operator-editable bootstrap fallback for sync-workspace-step4c.js. Used ONLY when no monitor/integrity/sync-workspace-runs-*.json sentinels exist (true first run, or after a retention purge). After the first sentinel lands, on-disk sentinels become the source of truth and this value is irrelevant on the hot path. Bump if you redeploy the helper after a long pause and want the upstream-newer-than-last-sync check to compare against a more recent floor (avoids spamming spurious sync triggers from ancient history).
